Issue: Vercel Prisma Client Query Engine Missing
Error Message: Prisma Client could not locate the Query Engine for runtime 'rhel-openssl-3.0.x'
Root Cause: Vercel build environment is Debian but AWS Lambda runtime is RHEL (Amazon Linux). Furthermore, Vercel caches node_modules so the client might not regenerate correctly.
Solution: Added 'rhel-openssl-3.0.x' to binaryTargets in schema.prisma and updated package.json build script to 'prisma generate && next build' to bypass cache.
